name: ng-button-group
title: Button Group (Angular)
description: Cluster of related buttons that share a stroke - composable ButtonGroup, ButtonGroupText, ButtonGroupSeparator. Horizontal or vertical, with optional inner separator. Mirrors React ButtonGroup from @gremorie/rx-forms.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-button-group.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
